verification.support_ticket_fallback: Open a support ticket using the support process configured by your admins.
verification.already_verified:
⚠️ You have already verified your STFC account!

If you need to:
- **Update your information or report an issue** → {support_ticket}

Only Admins can modify or recall your verification.
verification.dm_sent: ✅ Verification wizard sent to your DMs!
verification.dm_failed: ❌ I couldn't send you a DM. Please enable DMs from server members and try again.
verification.server_wrong: ❌ Your character must be on STFC Server {server_id}. You are currently on Server {current_server}.
verification.player_id_taken: ❌ This STFC player account is already linked to another Discord user. Each player account can only be verified once.
verification.recall_button: Click the button below to start verification again
wizard.welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to STFC Verification!
wizard.welcome.description: To access server features, you need to verify your STFC account.
wizard.welcome.field_what_value:
We use stfc.pro/stfc.wtf player data to verify your account and assign appropriate roles.
This ensures our community stays safe and organized.
wizard.welcome.field_rules_value:
- **One-time verification**: You can only verify once.
- **Link uniqueness**: Each player link can only be used once.
- **Admin recall**: If admins recall your verification, you can re-verify again.
wizard.welcome.field_ready_value: Click the button below to start the verification wizard.
wizard.welcome.footer: This message contains important information about verification.
wizard.step1.title: 📋 Step 1: STFC Player Link
wizard.step1.description:
Please send your https://stfc.pro player profile link.

**Valid formats:**
- `https://stfc.pro/players/XXXXXXXXXXXXX`
- `https://stfc.wtf/players/XXXXXXXXXXXXX`
- `https://stfc.live/players/XXXXXXXXXXXXX`
- Or just the player ID: `XXXXXXXXXXXXX`
wizard.step1.footer: Reply with your link in the next message
wizard.step1.footer_expired: Reply with your link in the next message (session expires in 10 minutes)
wizard.step2.title: 📷 Step 2: Player Profile Screenshot
wizard.step2.description:
Please upload a screenshot of your STFC player profile.

This is used for logging and verification purposes.
wizard.step2.footer: Reply with a screenshot attachment in the next message
wizard.already_verified:
⚠️ You have already verified your STFC account!

If you need to:
- **Update your information or report an issue** → {support_ticket}

Only Admins can modify or recall your verification.
wizard.session_expired: ❌ Your verification session has expired. Please use /verify to start again.
wizard.not_your_session: ❌ This is not your verification wizard.
wizard.player_data_stored: 💾 Player data stored for periodic updates
wizard.summary_description: Please review your information below. If everything looks correct, click **Complete**.
wizard.summary_footer: Review the data above and click Complete or Restart
wizard.invalid_link:
❌ Invalid player link. Please use format:
`https://stfc.pro/players/XXXXXXXXXXXXX` or `https://stfc.wtf/players/XXXXXXXXXXXXX` or just `XXXXXXXXXXXXX`
wizard.fetch_failed: ❌ Could not fetch player data from stfc.pro. Check the ID: `{player_id}`
wizard.no_image: ❌ Please upload an image file (PNG, JPG, etc.)
wizard.screenshot_error: ❌ Could not read screenshot. Please try again.
wizard.session_error: ❌ Session error: Could not retrieve player data. Please restart.
wizard.recalled_desc: Your STFC verification has been recalled by an administrator.
wizard.recalled_what_value: All roles assigned during verification have been removed. You can now re-verify whenever you're ready.
wizard.recalled_footer: Click the button below to start verification again
wizard.recalled_success:
✅ Verification for {member} has been recalled.
All roles removed. User has been notified via DM.
wizard.session_expired_desc:
Your verification session has expired (10 minute timeout).

Click the button below to start a new verification session.
rank.label: Rank
rank.confirm.not_admin: You do not have permission to confirm or reject rank changes.
rank.confirm.user_accepted_desc: Welcome, **{player_name}**! Your rank has been confirmed by admins.
rank.confirm.user_rejected_desc: Your rank promotion to {rank} was rejected by admins.
rank.confirm.dm_accepted_desc: Your rank promotion to **{rank}** has been confirmed by admins.
rank.confirm.dm_status_value: You now have full access to server features!
rank.confirm.dm_footer: Thank you for verifying your STFC account!
rank.confirm.dm_rejected_desc: Your rank promotion to **{rank}** was rejected by admins.
rank.confirm.dm_next_steps_value: Please contact an admin if you believe this was a mistake.
